text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I notice Bamboo Memory standing
totally still while I'm walking around the academy.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sorry about that! I was sleeping!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I figured I'd go to bed early since I had a break
and all, but I ended up waking up earlier than I
expected...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: But I can't let a little sleepiness like this get the best of me... Must get energy... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Bamboo Memory didn't get enough
rest.
